programs.name: Wyoming State Parks Senior Discounts
programs.what_it_does: Provides reduced fees for camping, day-use activities, and cabin rentals at Wyoming state parks and historic sites. Eligible seniors receive discounted rates on outdoor recreation activities.[2]
programs.whats_unique: State-specific discount program tied to Wyoming residency, complementing the federal National Parks Senior Pass[2]
programs.benefit_value: Specific discount amounts not detailed in search results[2]

programs.name: Low Income Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP)
programs.what_it_does: Helps seniors reduce heating and utility bills during winter months. Administered through Wyoming's Department of Family Services.[2]
programs.whats_unique: State-administered energy assistance program addressing Wyoming's harsh winter conditions[2]
programs.benefit_value: Specific benefit amounts not detailed in search results[2]

programs.name: Wyoming Tax Refund for Elder & Disabled
programs.what_it_does: Provides tax refund assistance for eligible elderly and disabled residents. Applications are available June through August.[6]
programs.whats_unique: State-specific tax relief program with seasonal application windows[6]
programs.benefit_value: Specific refund amounts not detailed in search results[6]
